special offer
Warm Welcome Wand's Soul

Once in a while, the unit launches a magic orb at a random unit. The orb bounces up to 4 times. If the orb hits an allied unit, the latter gains the harmony effect for 4 sec. During this time, the unit with the harmony effect restores 400000 health every second, and all allies in a small radius around the unit being healed restore health equal to 75% of the health restored by the original target. When the harmony effect wears off, the main target of the ability and all allies in a small radius around it have their max health, physical and magic armor, and fortitude increased by 50% for 4 sec. If the orb hits an enemy unit, the incineration effect is cast upon the target for 4 sec. The enemy takes 250000 pure damage every second, and all enemies in a small radius around the incinerated unit take pure damage equal to 75% of the damage taken by the original target. When the incineration wears off, the targets of the ability are weakened. Their max health, fortitude, as well as physical and magic armor are reduced by 50% for 4 sec.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet
